changelog: Fix: Installer 'Pre-configured for' now shows FQDN instead of IP (reads URBACKUP_SERVER_HOST as fallback)
Fix: Settings save (PUT /api/settings) no longer 500 — .env ownership corrected for service user
Fix: URBACKUP_SERVER_FQDN and URBACKUP_SERVER_HOST kept in sync on settings save
Fix: Update Now button — replaced window.confirm (browser-blocked) with inline confirmation UI
